about.title: About Me
about.description:
I am a Software Engineering student and a programming enthusiast. I have extensive experience in Data Engineering using multiple technologies, both legacy and cloud-based.

Constantly gathering new knowledge and seeking for enriching experiences. Always willing for team work. My motto is: “You don't know it, you can learn it”.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.item_desc_1_1: Creating and maintaining ETL processes in SSIS and Pentaho
experience.item_desc_1_2: Creating and maintaining tables, stored procedures, and database objects in SQL Server
experience.item_desc_1_3: Creating reports, dashboards, and schematic objects in MicroStrategy
experience.item_desc_1_4: Data query and use of queries in T-SQL, Oracle SQL, Postgre SQL, Informix SQL
experience.item_desc_1_5: Automated data loading and updating processes (ETLs, SPs, etc.)
experience.item_desc_2_1: Creating ETL processes in SSIS and Azure Data Factory
experience.item_desc_2_2: Modifying and updating reports in Power BI
experience.item_desc_2_3: Creating and modifying data loading processes in Azure Data Factory in conjunction with Azure tools (Power Apps, Logic Apps, Power Automate, etc.)
experience.item_desc_2_4: Creating and maintaining tabular models in SQL Server Analysis Services
experience.item_desc_2_5: Using REST APIs for data gathering
experience.item_desc_3_1: Creating and automating ETL processes in SSIS, Data Flow (ML's own tool) and AWS Glue, managing files via Git
experience.item_desc_3_2: Creating and maintaining database objects (tables, stored procedures, etc.) in SQL Server, Teradata, BigQuery, and AWS Athena
experience.item_desc_3_3: Storing data in the AWS cloud (S3)
experience.item_desc_4_1: Creating and automating data flows in Apache NiFi, integrating with multiple sources.
experience.item_desc_4_2: Creating and maintaining database objects (tables, stored procedures, etc.) in SQL Server
experience.item_desc_4_3: Creating and maintaining data processes in Python, orchestrated via Airflow and hosted in GCP
experience.item_desc_4_4: Storing data in the GCP cloud (BigQuery)
experience.item_desc_4_5: Managing and identifying needs with the business
